name: C-16 compliance-add requires the why_authoritative file to have at least 3 non-empty lines per the verbose contract
command: printf 'only one line\n' > w.txt && touch cat.yaml && EDITOR= bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" https://x.com --id test --catalog cat.yaml --why-authoritative-file w.txt 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q '3 non-empty' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
